title: German Pan-Seared Trout with Crispy Pancakes
description: A classic German dish featuring pan-seared trout served with crispy pancakes and a tangy side.
instructions: 1. In a large bowl, whisk together flour, eggs, milk, sour cream, sugar, and melted butter.
2. Gradually add the crispy pancake mix to the bowl and mix until smooth.
3. Heat a non-stick pan over medium heat.
4. Using a 1/4 cup measuring cup, scoop the pancake batter into the pan and cook until bubbles appear on the surface.
5. Flip the pancakes and cook for an additional 1-2 minutes.
6. Meanwhile, season the trout fillets with salt to taste.
7. Heat a non-stick pan over medium-high heat and add a small amount of oil.
8. Add the trout fillets to the pan and cook for 3-4 minutes on each side, or until cooked through.
9. Serve the pan-seared trout with the crispy pancakes and enjoy!
10. Garnish with a squeeze of lemon juice and a sprinkle of chopped parsley, if desired.
